site.name: My BMW Project
site.subtitle: Project Subtitle
site.description: A brief description of this project and its purpose.

hero.heading: Project Name
hero.tagline: A short, compelling tagline for your project.

features.name: Fast & Modern
features.description: Built with modern web standards. Lightweight, fast, and responsive across all devices.

features.name: BMW Branded
features.description: Follows the BMW 2025 design system with proper color tokens, typography, and spacing.

features.name: Dark Mode
features.description: Full dark mode support with system preference detection and manual toggle.

about.intro: This project is part of the BMW Group's digital transformation initiative. We leverage modern web technologies to deliver fast, accessible, and beautifully designed experiences.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: To create exceptional digital experiences that embody BMW's commitment to quality, innovation, and precision engineering.

sections.title: Technology
sections.content: This site is built as a static webapp using Mustache templating, BMW design tokens, and deployed automatically via GitHub Pages. Zero runtime dependencies, maximum performance.

sections.title: Team
sections.content: Built and maintained by the BMW Group digital team. Contributions and feedback are welcome.

contact.intro: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
